meaning: Plain 纳勒博平原[澳大利亚西南部](火箭制造基地和试验场)
examples: On your port beam, far across the horizon, is the Great Australian Bight and the unforgiving shores of the Nullarbor Plain.
We needed it, for the last leg was the toughest of all: the Nullarbor Plain, which stretches across the south of the country.
Watson is a red desert moonscape on the Nullarbor Plain at the eastern end of the world's longest stretch of straight rail track, 478km (297 miles).
Good descriptions of the Nullarbor (which means "treeless") Plain and of the fabulously awful industrial city of Port Hedland, north of the Outback Coast.
